description: Contains 3 generic motion verbs exceeding the 2 max

input.prompt: [00:00] Shika moves to the left side of the stage. The puppet goes toward the crowd. The lighting is bright and colorful. [00:04] Camera pans right. The scene is electric with energy. Shilshul moves forward. [00:08] Both puppets freeze. Keep same lighting. ENDING FRAME [EXACT]: Both visible.
